theme: Kids football team yearbook — paper-cut layered cardboard, cream paper sky, green felt pitch, blue/yellow club colors, floodlights, bunting, clubhouse
notes: Assets marked 'placeholder' are copies of kids_fantasy assets and must be replaced with sports-themed art. Assets marked 'draft' were generated with gpt-image-2 and may need refinement.

heroSlots._doc: Canonical hero slot grammar shared by every style folder. Filenames are lowercase: {slot}.webp, {slot}_{device}.webp, {slot}_{device}_{locale}.webp, person{n}_{locale}.webp. Locale fallback chain at build time: exact locale -> en-US -> unsuffixed -> first available.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — left floater, in front of cloud_left, slightly below
assets.description: Triangular pennant flag in blue/yellow club colors on a wooden stick, papercut style, floating left side of sky

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — right floater, in front of cloud_right, slightly below
assets.description: Gold trophy cup with blue/yellow ribbon, papercut style, glowing right side of sky

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — top-left background cloud, behind sky_left
assets.description: Layered paper cloud, soft cream tones. PLACEHOLDER: copy of kids_fantasy cloud; optionally tint cooler blue for sports sky.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — top-right background cloud, behind sky_right
assets.description: Layered paper cloud, soft cream tones. PLACEHOLDER: copy of kids_fantasy cloud; optionally tint cooler blue for sports sky.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — twinkle cluster centered above the page title
assets.description: Cluster of gold stars. PLACEHOLDER: copy of kids_fantasy sparkles; final art could mix stars with a small football accent.

assets.usage: HeroScene — back layer for tablet/laptop (z1), behind the person carousel
assets.description: Football pitch panorama with floodlights, bunting, clubhouse and goal, papercut style

assets.usage: HeroScene — back layer for mobile (z1), behind the person carousel
assets.description: Mobile crop of the football pitch panorama

assets.usage: HeroScene — front layer for tablet/laptop (z10), in front of the person carousel
assets.description: Low pitch-edge grass strip with sports balls, transparent top ~70%. A previous full-height bushes export was removed — it covered the person.

assets.usage: HeroScene — front layer for mobile (z10), in front of the person carousel
assets.description: Mobile crop of the low pitch-edge grass strip with sports balls, transparent top ~70%.

assets.usage: HeroScene person carousel — real person holding a real Mythoria book (z5, bottom-anchored, centered)
assets.description: Smiling boy in football kit holding his team's personalized yearbook, German cover title. DRAFT: verify cover text is localized (all locale files currently share one source image).
